title: How to build a custom vision agent
summary: Google Developer Expert John Capobianco demonstrates a custom vision agent that captures live webcam feeds using Nano Banana Pro and animates them with Veo 3, processing natural language prompts and ASL conversations through the Gemini ecosystem and Model Context Protocol.
writeup: Google Developer Expert John Capobianco walks through building a custom vision agent on Google Cloud Tech, capturing live webcam feeds with Nano Banana Pro and animating them through Veo 3. The agent processes natural language prompts and ASL conversations, tying the pieces together across the Gemini ecosystem and the Model Context Protocol. The demonstration shows how multimodal inputs and MCP can be combined into a single working agent.
